title: Incident Severity Escalation Matrix Model
description: Incident Severity / Escalation Matrix defining severity levels, escalation paths, and notification rules.

fields.name: severity_level
fields.purpose: Severity tier: critical | high | medium | low

fields.name: response_sla
fields.purpose: Target response time for the severity level

fields.name: escalation_contacts
fields.purpose: List of contacts or roles to notify at this severity

fields.name: auto_escalation_delay
fields.purpose: Delay before automatic escalation if unacknowledged

safety_notes: Schema readiness only. No runtime execution.
